holdings.infoBox: VFMF is an equity ETF with a total of 597 individual holdings. The top holdings are Newmont stock at 0.98%, Altria Group at 0.94%, Bristol-Myers Squibb Company at 0.91%, Merck & Co. at 0.89%, and HCA Healthcare at 0.87%.

overview.description: The Vanguard U.S. Multifactor ETF (VFMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund that invests in US equities exhibiting value, momentum, quality and low volatility factors. VFMF was launched on Feb 13, 2018 and is issued by Vanguard.
